The '''''Intervention''''' was a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[Fifth Fleet/Legends|Fifth Fleet]] of the [[Open Circle Fleet/Legends|Open Circle Armada]], a branch of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the last stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
[[File:InterventionOnBozPity.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The ''Intervention'' crashed on Boz Pity]]
During the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]], [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Prestor Organa]] used the ''Intervention'' on a survey of the situation in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. A task force led by [[High Jedi General/Legends|High General]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] accompanied Organa on this mission.

In reality, Organa wished to aid [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on his mission to bring the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] commander [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] to justice, and the ''Intervention'' left the survey to rendezvous with the wayward [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. With the help of the [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC trooper]] [[Alpha (Advanced Recon Commando)|Alpha]] and his elite [[Squad Seven (Galactic Republic)|Squad Seven]], the ''Intervention'' rescued Kenobi and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] from a [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture'' droid]] swarm at [[Maramere]], where they had been on a [[Mission to Maramere|mission]] to find Ventress, but found [[Durge/Legends|Durge]] instead.

Skywalker then pinpointed Ventress' location to the graveyard [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]]. After discovering that a large number of [[Confederate Navy/Legends|CIS starships]] had formed a blockade around the planet, Mace Windu and several other Jedi joined Kenobi on the ''Intervention'' and helped launch a preemptive assault on Boz Pity.

During the [[Battle of Boz Pity (Clone Wars)|Battle of Boz Pity]], Anakin Skywalker piloted the Star Destroyer past the Separatist blockade, but came out of hyperspace too close to the planet. The [[Warship/Legends|warship]] was forced to crash-land on the surface, where it was subsequently abandoned by the Jedi, who survived the crash.

==Appearances==
*[[Obsession 3|''Obsession'' 3]] {{1st}}
